description: Part C compound-route — /[org]/[slug]/tenant with BOTH segments destructured and BOTH bound in .eq chain (org → .eq('org_slug', org), slug → .eq('slug', slug)). MVP rule: suppression accepts ANY URL-param .eq per .from chain (not strict all-segments). Known-limitation: compound-route strict enforcement deferred to v0.12 (N-C-8). Today emits service_role + .from(); must NOT emit after Part C.
